headline: BlackRock Launches $12 Billion+ Meta Data Center Debt Deal
summary: BlackRock combines GIP and HPS to finance Meta's AI data center project through a major bond sale.

headline: Growth in AUM Balance Likely to Support Ameriprise's Q2 Earnings
summary: Growth in AUM and AUA balances could support AMP's Q2 results as higher fees are expected to lift revenues ahead of its July 23 earnings report.

headline: PJT Partners (PJT) Earnings Expected to Grow: What to Know Ahead of Next Week's Release
summary: PJT Partners (PJT) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
